title: Enga Ooru Kavalkaran
subTitle: A young and beautiful woman falls in love with her bodyguard. However, they must overcome many challenges in order to be together.

title: Ninaithaley Inikkum
subTitle: An energetic young woman Bommi captures the hearts of a sweet-making royal family. Her confident belief system plays a titular role in keeping the family together.

subTitle: A young man falls in love with a woman. However, he ends up going through emotional turmoil after she rejects his proposal and marries someone else.

title: Suvar Illatha Chithirangal

title: Nirai Kudam
subTitle: Prabakar and Chitra are medical students who fall in love with each other. However, their lives turn upside down when Chitra loses her eyesight and her brother due to a prank played by Prabakar.

subTitle: Kumaran, who is blind, gets attached with his eye doctor's daughter-in-law. However, he is shocked to learn that the man responsible for his sister's death is none other than the doctor's son.
